amendments.normalized_body: Fix the `BeadStarted` journal dedupe collision introduced by allowing distinct named runs to share a `started_at`. `src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs:469-482` now lets `run-3` start even when `run-2` already finalized at the same timestamp, but `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:448-452` still records the start event as only `project={project_id}`. Because `src/adapters/fs.rs:2452-2457` treats `(timestamp, event_type, bead_id, details)` as the dedupe key, two same-project starts at the same timestamp collapse into one journal row and the later retry disappears from the milestone audit trail. Include `run_id`/`plan_hash` in `BeadStarted` details or otherwise widen the dedupe key for start events.

final_accepted_amendments.normalized_body: Fix the `BeadStarted` journal dedupe collision introduced by allowing distinct named runs to share a `started_at`. `src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs:469-482` now lets `run-3` start even when `run-2` already finalized at the same timestamp, but `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:448-452` still records the start event as only `project={project_id}`. Because `src/adapters/fs.rs:2452-2457` treats `(timestamp, event_type, bead_id, details)` as the dedupe key, two same-project starts at the same timestamp collapse into one journal row and the later retry disappears from the milestone audit trail. Include `run_id`/`plan_hash` in `BeadStarted` details or otherwise widen the dedupe key for start events.

payload.summary: Final review accepted 1 amendment(s); restart required.
